short caption: Modern kitchen with white cabinets and stainless steel appliances.
medium caption: A modern kitchen features white cabinets, stainless steel appliances, and a farmhouse sink.  The backsplash is light gray tile with a darker gray grout.  A window is positioned above the sink.  Recessed lighting illuminates the space. The floor is covered in light gray hexagonal tiles.  A stainless steel refrigerator is visible on the left.  A stainless steel range and oven are on the right.
long caption: A bright, modern kitchen features white cabinets, stainless steel appliances, and a light gray hexagonal tile floor.  A stainless steel refrigerator stands on the left, and a stainless steel range and oven are on the right.  A farmhouse sink is centered beneath a window showcasing a view of trees.  Recessed lighting illuminates the space, and a pendant light hangs above the sink.  A backsplash of small, light gray tiles with a subtle pattern runs along the wall behind the sink and range.  Under-cabinet lighting is visible above the cabinets.  The ceiling is a light gray, and the overall atmosphere is clean and airy.
